description: SHAMBA LUV deploy manifest — the corrected emotonomics reflection token. NOTE: unlike the cypherpunk2048 immutable suites, LUV is a fee/reflection token with an owner+admin (fees lower-only; owner renounces after liquidity; admin retains router/weth maintenance for cross-chain). Primary chain = Ethereum.
posture: fee-on-transfer reflection (RFI) · owner renounceable · admin for cross-chain router maintenance

community.label: Community / emotonomics
community.orchestration: SHAMBA LUV — hold LUV earn LUV (3% reflection / 1% liquidity / 1% team); ETH primary, cross-chain ready

contracts.name: ShambaLuv

args.label: weth
args.role: wrapped native of the active chain

contracts.note: ctor(teamWallet, liquidityWallet, router, weth). Mints 100 Quadrillion (1e35) LUV to deployer. router/weth default to Ethereum mainnet when zero.
postDeploy: createPair(LUV, WETH) on the router's factory
setFeeExemption(airdropAddress, true) — so the 1T-LUV gesture arrives whole
renounceOwnership() once configured (admin retains router/weth maintenance)

contracts.name: ShambaLuvAirdrop

args.label: signer
args.role: the self-hosted backend voucher key (auth/) — NOT the owner

contracts.note: Signature-gated 'digital gesture' airdrop: 1 trillion LUV per real social signup, hard-capped at 1% of supply (1 Quadrillion = 1000 trillion = 1000 gestures). Replaces the Sybil-trivial open-claim contract. Off-chain Sybil gate = the self-hosted social-login → wallet → voucher service in shambaluv/auth/ (cypherpunk2048 wallet hosting; no paid third-party service).
postDeploy: on the LUV token: setFeeExemption(thisAddress, true)
fund: owner approve + deposit up to 1 Quadrillion LUV (1% of supply)
point auth/ at this address (AIRDROP_CONTRACT_ADDRESS) with VOUCHER_SIGNER = signer
